moments.title: England vs Mexico in World Cup Round of 16
moments.blurb: England faces Mexico in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 match kicking off in the early hours of Monday, July 6th (00:00 GMT / 1 AM BST).

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: It's the big one! England take on Mexico in the World Cup Round of 16 early Monday morning. Who's staying up to cheer on the Three Lions?

angles.name: Pre-match Excitement
angles.copy: All eyes on the World Cup! England are in action against Mexico in the Last 16. Can they make it to the quarter-finals?

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix Race Day
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 culminates tomorrow, Sunday, July 5th, with the main race at Silverstone, following today's Sprint and Qualifying sessions.

angles.name: Race Day Anticipation
angles.copy: Engines revving for Race Day! The British Grand Prix main event is tomorrow at Silverstone. Who's your money on for the win?

angles.name: Qualifying Recap
angles.copy: What a day of Sprint and Qualifying at Silverstone! All set for the big race tomorrow. Catch all the British Grand Prix action on Sunday!

moments.title: Wimbledon Second Week Underway
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 are in full swing, entering their second week with intense Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles matches and the Quarter-finals fast approaching.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: It's the second week of Wimbledon, and the tension is building on Centre Court! Who are you backing for the titles?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are out, and the tennis is heating up! Wimbledon's second week is here – any British hopefuls left?

moments.title: Pet Shop Boys Headline Lytham Festival
moments.blurb: Electronic pop legends Pet Shop Boys headline Lytham Festival today, Saturday, July 4th, bringing their 'Dreamworld' greatest hits show to Lancashire.

angles.name: Lytham Live
angles.copy: It's a 'Dreamworld' at Lytham Festival tonight as Pet Shop Boys headline! Who's there for the iconic synth-pop duo?

angles.name: Pop Legends
angles.copy: Go West! Or rather, go Lytham! Pet Shop Boys are bringing their incredible show to the festival tonight. Expect all the hits!

moments.title: Mumford & Sons and Duran Duran at BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: British Summer Time Hyde Park continues with Mumford & Sons headlining today, July 4th, and Duran Duran taking the stage tomorrow, July 5th.

angles.name: Hyde Park Weekend
angles.copy: Mumford & Sons rocking Hyde Park tonight, with Duran Duran ready for tomorrow! Who are you seeing at BST this weekend?

angles.name: Duran Duran Tomorrow
angles.copy: Sunday at BST Hyde Park belongs to Duran Duran! Get ready for a night of New Wave classics in the capital.

moments.title: Metallica's World Tour Finale in London
moments.blurb: Metallica plays the final night of their M72 World Tour at London Stadium tomorrow, Sunday, July 5th, promising a unique 'No Repeat Weekend' setlist.

angles.name: Metal Mayhem
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Metallica brings their M72 World Tour to a close at London Stadium! Who's ready for a historic night of heavy metal?

angles.name: No Repeat Weekend
angles.copy: Two nights, two different setlists! Metallica's final world tour date is tomorrow in London. Which hits are you hoping to hear?

moments.title: Wolf Alice Headline Finsbury Park
moments.blurb: North London rockers Wolf Alice play their biggest headline show to date at Finsbury Park tomorrow, Sunday, July 5th, with support from The Last Dinner Party and Lykke Li.

angles.name: Indie Rock Sunday
angles.copy: Wolf Alice take over Finsbury Park tomorrow for their biggest headline show yet! Who's joining them for a huge Sunday of live music?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: From grungy upstarts to festival headliners! Wolf Alice's massive London show is tomorrow. Which of their anthems are you buzzing for?

moments.title: BTS Stadium Shows Continue in London
moments.blurb: K-pop sensation BTS continues their highly anticipated UK stadium shows at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with dates running until July 8th.

angles.name: ARMY in London
angles.copy: BTS are still bringing the heat to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium! Are you one of the lucky ARMY members catching them live this week?

angles.name: K-Pop Phenomenon
angles.copy: The K-pop takeover continues in London! BTS are delivering incredible performances at Tottenham Stadium. Get your lightsticks ready!

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday, Post Malone!
moments.blurb: American rapper and singer Post Malone, known for hits like 'Circles' and 'Rockstar', celebrates his 31st birthday today, July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone! What's your favourite track from the genre-bending superstar?

angles.name: Celebrate with Hits
angles.copy: Raise a glass! Post Malone turns 31 today. We're celebrating with a playlist of his biggest hits. Which one are you streaming?

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday, John Waite!
moments.blurb: British rock singer John Waite, famous for 'Missing You' and his work with The Babys and Bad English, celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 4th.

angles.name: Rock Icon Bday
angles.copy: A very happy 74th birthday to rock legend John Waite! His voice defined an era. What's your favourite John Waite track?

angles.name: 80s Anthem
angles.copy: It's John Waite's birthday! Time to crank up 'Missing You' and relive those 80s power ballad vibes. Happy 74th!

moments.title: Happy 43rd Birthday, Melanie Fiona!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning Canadian R&B singer Melanie Fiona, known for her soulful vocals and debut album 'The Bridge', turns 43 today, July 4th.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 43rd Birthday to the incredibly talented Melanie Fiona! What's your favourite R&B jam from her?

angles.name: R&B Queen
angles.copy: Celebrate Melanie Fiona's 43rd birthday today! Her powerful voice has given us so many amazing tracks. Which one's on repeat for you?

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Courtney Love!
moments.blurb: American rock icon Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole and influential figure in the 90s alternative scene, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen Bday
angles.copy: Next week, the legendary Courtney Love turns 62! Get ready to celebrate the queen of grunge and Hole's unforgettable music.

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! Courtney Love's 62nd birthday is on July 9th. What's your go-to Hole track to blast?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin Across the UK
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are starting or have already begun for many children across the UK, marking the official start of the summer break.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here for many! Who's excited for weeks of fun, freedom, and hopefully some sunshine?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: And just like that, school's out for summer! What are your big plans for the long break? Staycation or jetting off?

moments.title: Mixed Bag for UK Summer Weather
moments.blurb: The forecast for July in the UK predicts a typical British summer mix: slightly above average temperatures with a chance of heavy showers and thunderstorms.

angles.name: Summer Forecast
angles.copy: Classic British summer incoming! Expect a mix of sunshine and those inevitable summer showers this July. Don't forget your brolly AND your shades!

angles.name: Weather Watch
angles.copy: July's weather looks set for warm spells but also a risk of thunderstorms. Are you hoping for a heatwave or happy with a milder summer?
